---
title: 📨 Writing Compliant Email Templates
---

Writing compliant email templates is anything but simple. The
following are some resources in your journey toward emails that render
well across all platforms. 🦄 

- <a target="_blank" href="https://www.litmus.com/blog/a-guide-to-rendering-differences-in-microsoft-outlook-clients/" ADD_DATE="1649949579" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Outlook Email Rendering Issues and How to Solve Them</a>
- <a target="_blank" href="https://www.campaignmonitor.com/css/" ADD_DATE="1649949582" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">CSS Support Guide for Email Clients</a>
- <a target="_blank" href="https://litmus.com/community/learning/8-outlook-overview" ADD_DATE="1649949620" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Outlook Overview &gt; Litmus</a>
- <a target="_blank" href="https://medium.com/email-design/outlook-rendering-issues-5-tips-to-ensure-your-emails-display-properly-9520b2456166" ADD_DATE="1649949796" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Outlook Rendering Issues: 5 Tips to Ensure Your Emails Display Properly</a>
- <a target="_blank" href="https://proofjump.com/email-source-converter/" ADD_DATE="1649959602" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Email Source Converter - ProofJump</a>
- <a target="_blank" href="https://templates.mailchimp.com/resources/inline-css/" ADD_DATE="1649963292" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">CSS Inliner Tool | Email Design Reference</a>
- <a target="_blank" href="https://htmlemail.io/inline/" ADD_DATE="1649963473" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Responsive Email CSS Inliner</a>
- <a target="_blank" href="https://www.goodemailcode.com/" ADD_DATE="1650044917">Welcome to the arrogantly named library of, Good Email Code</a>
- <a target="_blank" href="https://www.caniemail.com/" ADD_DATE="1650462651" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Can I email… </a>
- <a target="_blank" href="https://www.smashingmagazine.com/2021/04/complete-guide-html-email-templates-tools/" ADD_DATE="1650462690" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">A Complete Guide To HTML Email</a>
